---
name: triage
description: Classify and prioritize incoming work using repository priorities and constraints. Use when reviewing issue backlogs or planning next execution batch.
---

# triage

## Workflow

1. Gather items to triage (issues, requests, bug reports).
2. Classify by impact, urgency, risk, and dependency.
3. Map recommendations to local governance constraints.
4. Propose labels and order of execution.
5. Flag items needing clarification before action.

## References

Use `GOVERNANCE.md`, `docs/decisions/`, and project docs as ranking context.
